title: dryopteris retrorsa
intro: Dryopteris retrorsa, also known as the mountain male fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris retrorsa include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Dryopteris retrorsa can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
